nasb.text: The Lord has taken away His judgments against you, He has cleared away your enemies. The King of Israel, the Lord, is in your midst; You will fear disaster no more.

esv.text: The Lord has taken away the judgments against you; he has cleared away your enemies. The King of Israel, the Lord, is in your midst; you shall never again fear evil.

cnv.text: 耶和華已經除去你們的刑罰， 趕走你們的仇敵。 以色列的王，耶和華在你們中間， 你們必不再懼怕災禍。

ccb.text: 耶和华已经撤销对你的刑罚， 赶走你的仇敌， 以色列的王耶和华与你同在， 你必不再惧怕灾祸。
